group.description: Eclipse RCP-specific report concepts (per-bundle AsciiDoc fragments for plugin.xml extension points and extensions).

concept.description: Eclipse extension points declared by the bundle's plugin.xml.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:DEFINES_EXTENSION_POINT]->(ep:Eclipse:ExtensionPoint) RETURN b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, ep.extensionPointId AS ExtensionPointId, coalesce(ep.extensionPointName, '') AS Name, coalesce(ep.schema, '') AS Schema ORDER BY SymbolicName, ExtensionPointId

concept.description: Eclipse extensions contributed by the bundle, with the referenced extension point and any implementing Java class found in the graph.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:DECLARES_EXTENSION]->(ext:Eclipse:Extension) OPTIONAL MATCH (ext)-[:IMPLEMENTED_BY]->(impl) RETURN b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, ext.point AS Point, coalesce(ext.extensionId, '') AS ExtensionId, coalesce(ext.extensionName, '') AS Name, coalesce(impl.fqn, '') AS Implementation ORDER BY SymbolicName, Point, ExtensionId
